name: Noir Lace Bloom Dress
description: An elegant fit-and-flare silhouette wrapped in delicate floral lace. The Noir Lace Bloom Dress features a sheer embroidered overlay, soft bell sleeves, and a flattering knee-skimming hem — designed for evenings that call for quiet drama.
fabric: Floral lace overlay with satin lining
careInstructions: Dry clean only. Store on a padded hanger. Avoid direct sunlight and steam gently to refresh.

name: Amethyst Zarine Set
description: A rich amethyst-hued ensemble finished with gilded trim at the neckline and a hand block-printed dupatta with tassel detail. Effortlessly festive, the Amethyst Zarine Set is built for celebrations that deserve a little shine.
fabric: Pure silk blend dress with chiffon dupatta
careInstructions: Dry clean only. Iron dupatta on low heat. Store folded with tissue between layers.

name: Ivory Meadow Tiered Maxi
description: Soft ivory organza meets a ribbon of pastel stripes in this dreamy tiered maxi. A ruffled waist and gently flared skirt give the Ivory Meadow Maxi a romantic, garden-party feel for daytime celebrations.
fabric: Organza with ribbon trim, cotton lining
careInstructions: Hand wash cold or dry clean. Do not wring. Hang dry away from direct heat.

name: Rosalind Anarkali Set
description: Regal and refined, the Rosalind Anarkali Set pairs an ivory silk Anarkali with deep maroon zari borders and a sequin-edged dupatta. A statement piece for weddings, receptions, and festive evenings.
fabric: Silk with zari embroidery, net dupatta
careInstructions: Dry clean only. Store flat or on a padded hanger. Keep away from moisture.

name: Violet Aster Co-ord Dress
description: A geometric-print top finished with a delicate floral brooch, paired with a flowing matching skirt. The Violet Aster Co-ord Dress is easy elegance for brunches, daytime events, and everything between.
careInstructions: Machine wash gentle cycle, cold water. Hang to dry. Cool iron if needed.
